Appearances:
Plaintiff The Granada, Inc. is present. Represented by Tony Davidauskis
Attorney Michael Lieberman appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Robert Graham is present.
Attorney Justin Lau representing the defendant through limited scope.
Judge Karnow, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 608, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.

This case settled, the trial date of OCT-17-2011 is vacated.
